- Update to 0.8.7p1

- Trim Makefile header
- Add LICENSE
- Install buildslave manual page
- Switch to setuptools and make zip_safe=False unconditional
- Remove unecessary post-patch:
- Use upstream NO_INSTALL_REQ env var to avoid dependencies
- Add TESTS options and regression-test: target
- Add zip_safe=True
